title: Acquire Redis Locks with Go
summary: Acquire and release a Redis lock in Go with SET NX and a compare-and-delete release step.
highlights: Uses SET NX for lock acquire
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers successful lock acquisition, lock contention, wrapped store errors, release with a matching owner token, refusing release for a different owner token, and invalid input handling. The tests use a fake store rather than a live Redis instance.
